history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Hello! I see we have Our World Famous Fries® available. Would you like to order that for yourself?

history.speaker: client
history.text: What do you recommend for three people? One person can't have dairy.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: For the person who can't have dairy, Chicken McNuggets® don't contain dairy (allergens show only gluten). Would you like to order that for them? Then for the other two people, would you like to order nuggets too?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Yes, I'll take Chicken McNuggets for my friend who can't have dairy. For the other two, I'd like a regular burger and a side of fries.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Okay, I've got Chicken McNuggets for your friend who can't have dairy — safe since they don't contain dairy. For the other two, could you tell me what you'd like to order? We only have Chicken McNuggets available right now.

history.speaker: client
history.text: I'll take Chicken McNuggets for all three then.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Okay, all three will get 1 Chicken McNuggets® each — no dairy in this item, so safe for your friend. Is this correct?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Yes, that's correct for all three. No other items needed.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Your order is 1 Chicken McNuggets® for all three. Safe for your friend (no dairy). Thank you!

history.speaker: client
history.text: Yes, that's correct for all three. Thanks!

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Perfect! Your order is confirmed. Safe for your friend. Thank you!

- Before finalising, repeat the full order and ask for confirmation.
- If the customer mentions allergies, check allergen data from context.
